message.content:
PASS
(1) The tab bar (Candidatures / Étudiants / Enseignants / Notes / Absences / Alertes) is GONE. (2) The welcome heading 'Bonjour, Amadou ! Voici l'activité du jour' and the date line are still present. (3) The stat cards directly follow the welcome heading with no tab bar in between. Below the heading, there are six stat cards displaying metrics: "8 Total Étudiants Inscrits actifs", "3 Nouvelles Candidatures En attente", "1 Dossiers Validés Traites", "1 Dossiers Incomplets Action requise", "5 Alertes IA Actives Risque pédagogique", and "85% Taux d'Assiduité Établissement".
